JOSEPH RAIFSNIDER, ESQ., APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY ANDREW GSCHWIND, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF DALJIT JOHL'S MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY ANDREW GSCHIND IS HEARD THIS DAY. AFTER ARGUMENT OF RESPECTIVE COUNSEL COURT ORDERED MOTION DENIED. COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780. (212)>

Noice Of Motion For Monetary Sanctions Against Deputy City Attorney Andrew Gschwind For Flagrant Violation Of The Trial Court Delay Reduction Act
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Joseph Raifsnider, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Deputy City Attorney Andrew Gschwind, appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff Daljit Johl's Motion for Monetary Sanctions against Deputy City Attorney Andrew Gschind is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered motion denied. Court ordered Defendant's request for monetary sanctions denied. Prevailing party to submit proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Joe Vickstein, CSR# 4780. (212)
